description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly off-white upper, accented by navy blue and red stitching details. The shoe features a rounded toe with perforations for breathability and a navy blue lace-up closure. The collar and tongue are padded and lined with a dark material, likely for comfort and support. The midsole and outsole are white, with a textured toe bumper for added durability. Decorative stitching in red and navy runs along the sides, adding a sporty aesthetic. The overall design is casual and suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A casual off-white sneaker with navy blue laces, red and navy stitching, and a white textured sole, designed for everyday urban use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel with vertical and horizontal stitching details and a padded collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red and navy decorative stitching, perforated toe, and navy blue laces.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded perforated toe, navy blue laces, and the brand name on the tongue.
description_view_3: Right side view with similar stitching details as the left, showing the shoe's profile and sole curvature.
attribute_logo: White 'biti's' text logo on the tongue
